title: MR Strategy — FCF Top-200, 10 Most Oversold
description: Mean Reversion backtest results. Universe: top-1500 domestic, FCF>2%, net debt <=1x, vol >=$20M. Stage-1: top-200 by FCF yield. Stage-2: 10 most oversold. Daily rebalance. IS 2001-2021: CAGR +28.8%, IR 0.729, MaxDD -75.8%. OOS 2022-2026: CAGR +17.5%, IR 0.504, MaxDD -35.9%. Includes full validation fields: signal value, revenue, FCF/EBIT TTM+yield, interest coverage, net debt, market cap, 10d volume.

title: MOM Strategy — Top-500 Domestic, FCF>0%
description: Momentum (6m1m) backtest results. Universe: top-500 domestic stocks by market cap, positive FCF. Weekly Friday rebalance (drift-hold between rebals), N=10. IS 2001-2021: CAGR +15.4%, IR 0.555, MaxDD -60.3%. OOS 2022-2026: CAGR +41.6%, IR 1.050, MaxDD -40.8%. Correctly held NVDA/META/TSLA in 2023. Includes full validation fields: signal value, revenue, FCF/EBIT TTM+yield, interest coverage, net debt, market cap, 10d volume.

title: LV Strategy — Top-600 Domestic, FCF>5%
description: Low Volatility backtest results. Universe: top-600 domestic stocks by market cap, FCF yield >5%. Weekly Friday rebalance (drift-hold between rebals), N=10, 60d vol signal. IS 2001-2021: CAGR +12.0%, IR 0.957, MaxDD -32.1%. OOS 2022-2026: CAGR +10.2%, IR 0.863, MaxDD -12.5%. Includes full validation fields: signal value, revenue, FCF/EBIT TTM+yield, interest coverage, net debt, market cap, 10d volume.
